name: replayio
description: Direct Replay.io dev tools for Replay Chromium recording, ffmpeg-backed MP4 browser evidence, worker/critic proof loops, side-by-side video stitching, upload hooks, and Replay MCP debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Direct Replay.io dev tools for recordings, proof loops, MP4 evidence, and Replay MCP debugging
interface.longDescription: Open browser sessions through packaged lifecycle scripts that enable Replay recording flags and start WebM screencast capture automatically, then stop capture, transcode to MP4 with ffmpeg, close the browser, verify the MP4 artifact, and upload pending Replay recordings when the browser closes. Use the included worker/critic prompt templates for build-and-falsify proof loops: a worker builds, self-validates, and records the proof session, while a read-only critic inspects the Replay timeline against the requirements and diff. Use the side-by-side stitch helper for two-session proof videos and the skill guidance to add project-specific record:replay scripts that start local emulators, run Replay Playwright configs, upload finished recordings, and write MP4 evidence. A Codex stop hook also runs close/upload cleanup as a safety net. Use Replay MCP tools to analyze uploaded recordings with rich debugging widgets for logpoints, console output, React trees, Redux state, network requests, screenshots, source code, profiles, and exception stacks.
defaultPrompt: Record an agent browser session against this local app, embed the MP4 video, and analyze the resulting recording
Inspect this uploaded Replay recording through Replay MCP and summarize the root cause evidence
Run a worker/critic Replay proof loop for this UI change
